_publications._publicationTitle: Medium throughput biochemical compound screening identifies novel agents for pharmacotherapy of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: S462TY cells were extremely sensitive to the calcium channel blocker Nifedipine...S462TY showed high sensitivity to Nifedipine, but was the least sensitive to Cantharidin in vitro
details: Extremely sensitive to calcium channel blocker Nifedipine but least sensitive to Cantharidin in vitro
